name: Day Six The Giants Arrive
angle: The heavyweights finally entered the 2026 World Cup on Tuesday, and Day Six belonged to the record books: Lionel Messi's first World Cup hat-trick drew him level with Miroslav Klose as the men's tournament's all-time top scorer, Kylian Mbappe became France's all-time leading scorer, and Erling Haaland marked his long-awaited debut with a brace.

questions.question: Lionel Messi scored a hat-trick as Argentina opened their 2026 campaign. What was the final score against Algeria?
Erling Haaland scored twice on his long-awaited World Cup debut. Which nation was he playing for?
France came from behind to beat Senegal 3-1. Which forward scored twice, including a long-range strike deep in stoppage time?
Messi's hat-trick took him to 16 World Cup goals, drawing him level with which player as the men's tournament's all-time leading scorer?
At 38, Messi surpassed Cristiano Ronaldo to become the oldest player ever to do what at a World Cup?
Mbappe's double made him France's all-time leading scorer with 58 goals, moving him past which striker on 57?
Norway's 4-1 win over Iraq was their first World Cup appearance since which tournament?
Miroslav Klose, whose World Cup goals record Messi equalled at the 2026 tournament, won the trophy with which country in 2014?
The brace also took Mbappe past Just Fontaine as France's all-time World Cup scorer. How many World Cup goals does Mbappe now have?
Austria opened with a 2-1 win on a night that marked their opponents' first-ever World Cup appearance. Which debutants did they beat?
Norway's rout of Iraq was rounded off by a goal deep into second-half stoppage time. Who scored it?
Messi's hat-trick came at which Kansas City stadium, home to the NFL's Chiefs?
Haaland dragged Norway to the finals as the leading scorer of European qualifying, eight clear of anyone else. How many did he score in the campaign?
Mbappe broke Just Fontaine's France World Cup record, a tally of 13 goals set at a single tournament. In which year did Fontaine score them?
Messi's treble against Algeria made him both the youngest and oldest goalscorer in Argentina's World Cup history. In which tournament did an 18-year-old Messi score his first World Cup goal?
